name: @emngny/oh-my-kilocode-slim
description: Lightweight agent orchestration plugin for KiloCode - a slimmed-down fork of oh-my-kilocode-slim

scripts.clean:dist: bun -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })"
scripts.build:plugin: bun build src/index.ts src/tui.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --external @ast-grep/napi --external @kilocode/plugin --external "@kilocode/plugin/*" --external @kilocode/sdk --external "@kilocode/sdk/*" --external @opentui/core --external @opentui/solid --external jsdom --external zod
scripts.build:cli: bun build src/cli/index.ts --outdir dist/cli --target node --format esm --external @ast-grep/napi --external @kilocode/plugin --external "@kilocode/plugin/*" --external @kilocode/sdk --external "@kilocode/sdk/*" --external jsdom --external zod
scripts.build: bun run clean:dist && bun run build:plugin && bun run build:cli && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly && bun run generate-schema
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && git push --follow-tags && npm publish
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && git push --follow-tags && npm publish
scripts.release:major: npm version major && git push --follow-tags && npm publish
scripts.release:beta: npm version premajor --preid beta && git push --follow-tags && npm publish --tag beta
scripts.release:beta:next: npm version prerelease --preid beta && git push --follow-tags && npm publish --tag beta
